name: keigakomi_inline_framed

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.7 + ADR-0027] The core recognises only the canonical 罫囲み; the non-canonical, corpus-rare 枠囲み / 枠囲い decline to a lossless Unknown directive (kept byte-exact, never folded to 罫囲み). A Tier1 lint suggests は罫囲み. This vector pins the に-particle + 枠囲み form declining verbatim. Bytes from the reference parser.

source: 新興河上［＃「新興河上」に枠囲み］。

expected.html: 新興河上［＃「新興河上」に枠囲み］。
expected.serialize: 新興河上［＃「新興河上」に枠囲み］。
